name: Diaub
description: A Jakobs sniper type built for a quicker cadence than most bolt-action rifles. It keeps the usual high-impact Jakobs feel, but fires at a pace closer to a semi-auto, which makes accurate follow-up shots easier to place with less downtime between them.
notes: A special Diaub branded with Gearbox was included with the Premiere Club pre-order bonus. Regular versions can drop from standard world loot sources.
